Beer on tap.name: 250 IPA
Beer on tap.description: Born in New England and made exclusively with American-grown ingredients. Dry-hopped with Sabro, Idaho 7, Mosaic, and HBC 522. Celebrating America's 250th Anniversary.

Beer on tap.name: The Day I Tried To Live
Beer on tap.description: Bold and unapologetic, this beer is a modern take on the classic West Coast IPA. It showcases the distinctive character of Nelson, Citra, and Simcoe hops, with dank aromas paired with vibrant citrus notes. The crisp, dry finish is balanced with a medium-high bitterness and a resinous hop bite that defines the style. Enjoy a moment that lingers long after the pour, it’s one you’ll want to relive.

Beer on tap.name: Time Off
Beer on tap.description: Witbier brewed with orange zest and coriander seeds. Color: Straw hazy. Aroma: Coriander, pink peppercorns, orange, white flowers, bread. Flavor: Orange zest, coriander, peppercorns with medium-high intensity. Medium mouthfeel, creamy with a persistent orange flavor.

Beer on tap.name: Swirl
Beer on tap.description: Color - Golden yellow haze. Aroma - Citrus, cantaloupe, wine grapes, strawberry. Flavor - Smooth and tropical. Body - Medium. *Citra hops, and dry-hopped with Idaho 7, Nelson Sauvin

Beer on tap.name: Elegant Viking
Beer on tap.description: Color - Orange haze Aroma - Mango, citrus, peaches Body - Medium low Flavor - Orange, tangerine, mango, peach, medium high bitterness Dry-Hopped with Nectaron, Strata, Galaxy

Beer on tap.name: The Presence
Beer on tap.description: Double IPA with the addition of Phantasm from New Zealand. Superdelic and Simcoe dry hop

Beer on tap.name: Footloose
Beer on tap.description: Silver Medal - Aro Rojo Beer Cup Silver Medal - Rhode Worthy Immerse in the rich beer heritage of the Czech Republic with our Bohemian Pilsner, a homage to the Czech Lager tradition.

Beer on tap.name: Half-Dark
Beer on tap.description: Czech Amber Lager - Aroma notes of biscuit, dried fruit, slight caramel, and a minimal spicy hop. Subtle malt flavors and earthiness present with a dry finish.

Beer on tap.name: Wanaka Willow
Beer on tap.description: The Wanaka tree stands alone in the calm waters of Lake Wanaka, personifying purity and natural beauty. New Zealand Pilsner: refreshing, clean, and simple in appearance, yet offering a complex blend of aromas and flavors in every sip.

Beer on tap.name: Glacier
Beer on tap.description: Color - Straw. Aroma - Bread, grain. Flavor - Azahar flower (orange blossom), citrus. Body - Low-medium.

Beer on tap.name: Mirage Royale
Beer on tap.description: Mango and Pineapple sour

Beer on tap.name: Alternate Continuum
Beer on tap.description: Aged in Chardonnay white wine barrels for 13 months. Wine character flavors, with notes of apricot and peach, pineapple, and white flowers. A gentle toast from the oak adds layers of vanilla, coconut, and a subtle spice.

Beer on tap.name: Footloose
Beer on tap.description: Silver Medal - Aro Rojo Beer Cup Silver Medal - Rhode Worthy Immerse in the rich beer heritage of the Czech Republic with our Bohemian Pilsner, a homage to the Czech Lager tradition.

Beer on tap.name: Half-Dark
Beer on tap.description: Czech Amber Lager - Aroma notes of biscuit, dried fruit, slight caramel, and a minimal spicy hop. Subtle malt flavors and earthiness present with a dry finish.

Beer on tap.name: Cascade Brook  (Can Pours 16oz)
Beer on tap.description: Featuring 100% 2025 harvest season apples from Phantom Farms on Diamond Hill Road in Cumberland, RI. Gently dry-hopped with Citra and Simcoe.

Beer on tap.name: Blushing Sky (Can Pours 16oz)
Beer on tap.description: Cider with real raspberry puree, no artificial flavors. Gluten free. Pink hue of the cider evokes the serene, picturesque quality of a sunset or twilight sky. Evocative and calming—great for conveying the peaceful experience of enjoyment.

Beer on tap.name: Wander (Can Pours 16oz)
Beer on tap.description: Brewed with Origin Beer Project from Providence, RI. Chosen hops in partnership with Yakima Chief Hops, Wander explores the partnership between the city and the valley, bringing fresh, earthy hop notes with some fruit undertones. Shaped by both place and process.

Beer on tap.name: Mordax (Can Pours 16oz)
Beer on tap.description: Dry-hopped with Anchovy and Superdelic hops

Beer on tap.name: Greenway (Can Pours 16oz)
Beer on tap.description: Strata + Nelson Sauvin hops

Beer on tap.name: Warp And Weft (Can Pours 16oz)
Beer on tap.description: Collaboration with Con es Puma! Layered with citrus, pine, white grapes, dank resin, and roasted coffee bean notes.
